titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 220: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 220. (A.R. No. 569 of 1908.) TIRUPPALĀTTUṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Ādimūlēśvara temple.

This records an endowment of 1(1/2) mā of land, as ambalappuṟam for (meeting the) expenses for the Dayāparappērambalam, the hall for the (meeting of the) assembly in the village, by some persons (names lost) after purchase of the same probably from the sabhā of the brahmadēyam, of Śrī-Uttamaśīlī-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. Against the taxes such as seṉṉīr, veṭṭi and others payable on that land the donor purchased some more land (half-kāṇi and one mundrigai) of eighth grade for five kāśu and entrusted it to the same sabhā for making the land endowed for ambalappuṟam, as tax-free. If the sabhā charged iṟai on that land they were to be fined fifty poṉ and at the same time maintained the iṟaiyili status of the land.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. III No. 150.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .— kopparakesarivarmmarāna śrī Uttamacoḻarkku yāṇṭu
brahmadeyam śrī Uttamaciliccaturvvetimaṅkala
vāsudevaṉum
damaged
yāka I mivar vilaikoṇṭa nilam
ri cantiran viṣṇubhaṭṭan Uḷḷiṭṭa catukkattārkkuppaṭṭa Añcām pāṭakam
mekkaṭaiya Ivar vilaikoṇṭa nilam � Ivvoru māvaraic ceyumivvūr
ttu Ivar Eṭuppicca dayāparapperampalattukku Ampalappuṟamāk koṇṭu I
Iṟukkiṟa taram 8 Āya nilam � Ivvaraikkāṇi muntirikai nilattukkum taṭṭiṟaiyā
ka vanta kācu 5 Añcum kaiyile koṇṭu muncuṭṭappaṭṭa Oru māvaraicceyum cantirātitta
val Iṟaiyiliyāka paṇiccu nilamutalum pottakattum Iṟaivāṭṭi tiruppāttuṟai
[śrī] vimānatte ślālekaiRead śilālekhaiceytu Innilam cennir veṭṭiyum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum ka
ṭamai yillāmaiyil Iṟaikāṭṭil sabhai yeṭukkap ponnum tiruppātam
per pon 5 10m ponnu muntuṟṟāre maṉṟappeṟuvārākavu manṟina
pon maṟaiyili Iṟuttum pintaiyuminnilam Iṟaikāttukkuṭuppo
mānom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
